name: citizenFromBirthCity
description: Someone born in a city that sits in a country gets citizenship for that country.

name: residenceFromCity
description: If they live in a city that sits in a country, they live in that country.

name: workCountryFromHeadquarters
description: If they work at a company headquartered in a country, their employment country is that one.

name: languageFromBirthChain
display_title: Language From Birth City And Country
description: Birth city lies in a country; that country has an official language in the KG, so they speak that language.

name: languageFromCitizenship
display_title: Language From Citizenship And Official Languages
description: Citizen of a country that has an official language in the KG: they speak that language. Same head as the birth-city rule, different path.
